title: Computational evidence for a distributed AT-based regulatory mechanism enabling de novo gene birth in Pandoravirus salinus
description: Analysis scripts, data, results, and manuscript for a computational study of de novo gene birth mechanisms in Pandoravirus salinus. Includes a 12-module analytical pipeline covering compositional analysis, structural prediction, transcriptomic validation, and genome-wide BLASTp homology analysis.
notes: This repository accompanies a manuscript submitted for peer review. All statistics cited in the manuscript are mapped to source computations in statistics_audit.json.
